subcodes.first_line: O beloved of the Lord! For a time now, the dispatch of letters from 'Abdu'l-Bahá addressed to the friends has waned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای احبای الهی مدتی است که مکاتیب عبدالبهاء مخاطبا للاحباء صدورش فتور یافته
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @service to others; to the Cause of God
